name: recoup-content
description: Generate, edit, and publish content for artists across Recoup's surfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Generate, edit, and publish artist content for Recoup
interface.longDescription: A content workflows plugin for Recoup. Bundles skills that help AI agents draft, edit, and publish content for artists across Recoup's surfaces — captions, blurbs, release copy, social posts, and more.
